provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, gnarled wizard staff of dark twisted wood, natural bark texture along the shaft, a pale blue crystal orb cradled in the forked crown of the staff, faint inner glow from the crystal, the wood grain spirals upward, simple leather thong tied below the crystal mount, earthy brown tones on the wood
provenance.negative_prompt: blurry, text, letters, runes, watermark, signature, 3d render, ambient occlusion, photorealistic, photograph, multiple items, two objects, cropped, cut off, pixel art, cel-shaded, flat shading, neon colors, gradient background, white background, light background, modern, sci-fi, futuristic, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, frame, border, vignette

judgment.explanation: Looks like a table lamp more than a staff — squat proportions with a glowing flame-shaped crystal. Identity confusion.
